TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_romi‚Äôad_no_kalokitakit_sowal_no_ina, title = O_romi‚Äôad_no_kalokitakit_sowal_no_ina, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_romi‚Äôad_no_kalokitakit_sowal_no_ina} }

S.FORM: O romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina ŚúčťöõśĮćŤ™ěśó• To mihecahecaan saka 2 folad 21 romi'ad niketonan o romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina, o Linhoko kiwiko, kakak ato punka a lekatep i 1999 miheca mapasadak maketong, nai 2000 miheca, mihecahecaan saka 2 folad 21 romi'ad niketonan o romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina. Patosokan sakiliyok no hekal misinting midama to katadamaan no sowal, micekeroh palosiyang to sowal no ina a onto, saka ecaaw kalasawad ko sowal i hekal. Likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Calay: Pangkalatis sowal a onto 1948 miheca, o Pakistan a sifo pala no kitakit a sowal ko Orto a sowal, sakapico'a'ang no sakawali a Pakistan a finawlan. I Pangkalatis sowal a onto i, ira ko 5 tamdaw i 1952 miheca 2 falad 21 romi'ad makowangay mapatay no sofitay . 1956 miheca, no Pangkalatis a kinpo matelek o Pangkalatis sowal ato Orto sowal malosowal no kitakit. 1971 miheca, Pangkalatis kitakit micidek to Pakistan a misiked, i Taka misafa'eloh patireng to "Pa'ading to sowal no ina a pihiratengan 'otoc" . 1999 miheca 11 folad, Linhoko kiwiko, kakak, punka a lekatep saka 30 lekad a kalomaoc miketon kai mihecahecaan saka 2 folad 21 romi'adan o "o romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina" . O romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina nai 2000 mihecaan kalomihecaan mitiway, o sapicekeroh to sakalacecay rihaday hekal ato kasahirahira no sowal, a mapadama ko polong a sowal no ina . Kayki no Linhoko i saka 61 lekad i 2007 miheca 5 folad 17 romi'ad mihayda to cecay niketonan, mihapiw 2008 miheca o "Miheca no sowal i kasakitakit", pahapinang to kasasiromaroma no sowal o picekeroh to kasasiromaroma no punka ato kasaspsap no kasakitakit a tadamaan, onini a niketonan o maro'ay i Kanata Wenkofa a Pangkalatis a tamdaw ci Rafikul Islam ko pasadakay. I 1998 miheca 1 folad 9 romi'ad patilid to tilid ci Kofi Annanan, milongoc cingraan to pihayda mihapiw to romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina sapipa'orip to sowal no hekal a caay kalasawad. Ci Rafikul paini yana romi'ad kai 2 folad 21 romi'adan, o sapihirateng to nano onto a sowal i Pangkalatis .
S.PHON: o~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u ka…ĺo~ukitakit so~uwa…ĺ no~u ina ***** to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ nik…ôto~unan o~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u ka…ĺo~ukitakit so~uwa…ĺ no~u ina, o~u …ĺinńßo~uko~u kiwiko~u, kakak ato~u po~u~unka a …ĺ…ôkat…ôp i **** mińß…ô ¶a mapasa…¨~…ģak mak…ôto~uŇč, nai **** mińß…ô ¶a, mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ so~uwa…ĺ ko~u o~urto~u a so~uwa…ĺ, sakapi ¶o~u °a °aŇč no~u sakawa…ĺi a pakistan a finaw…ĺan. i paŇčka…ĺatis so~uwa…ĺ a o~unto~u i, ira ko~u * tam…¨~…ģaw i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fa…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mako~uwaŇčaj mapataj no~u so~ufitaj . **** mińß…ô ¶a, no~u paŇčka…ĺatis a kinpo~u mat…ô…ĺ…ôk o~u paŇčka…ĺatis so~uwa…ĺ ato~u o~urto~u so~uwa…ĺ ma…ĺo~uso~uwa…ĺ no~u kitakit. **** mińß…ô ¶a, paŇčka…ĺatis kitakit mi ¶i…¨~…ģ…ôk to~u pakistan a misik…ô…¨~…ģ, i taka misafa °…ô…ĺo~uńß patir…ôŇč to~u "pa °a…¨~…ģiŇč to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ina a pińßirat…ôŇčan °o~uto~u ¶" . **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, …ĺinńßo~uko~u kiwiko~u, kakak, po~u~unka a …ĺ…ôkat…ôp saka ** …ĺ…ôka…¨~…ģ a ka…ĺo~umao~u ¶ mik…ôto~un kai mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģan o~u "o~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u ka…ĺo~ukitakit so~uwa…ĺ no~u ina" . o~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u ka…ĺo~ukitakit so~uwa…ĺ no~u ina nai **** mińß…ô ¶aan ka…ĺo~umińß…ô ¶aan mitiwaj, o~u sapi ¶…ôk…ôro~uńß to~u saka…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj rińßa…¨~…ģaj ńß…ôka…ĺ ato~u kasańßirańßira no~u so~uwa…ĺ, a mapa…¨~…ģama ko~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč a so~uwa…ĺ no~u ina . kajki no~u …ĺinńßo~uko~u i saka ** …ĺ…ôka…¨~…ģ i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mińßaj…¨~…ģa to~u ¶…ô ¶aj nik…ôto~unan, mińßapiw **** mińß…ô ¶a o~u "mińß…ô ¶a no~u so~uwa…ĺ i kasakitakit", pańßapinaŇč to~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u so~uwa…ĺ o~u pi ¶…ôk…ôro~uńß to~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u po~u~unka ato~u kasaspsap no~u kasakitakit a ta…¨~…ģamaan, o~unini a nik…ôto~unan o~u maro~u °aj i kanata w…ônko~ufa a paŇčka…ĺatis a tam…¨~…ģaw ¶i rafiko~u~u…ĺ is…ĺam ko~u pasa…¨~…ģakaj. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pati…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ¶i ko~ufi annanan, mi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ ¶iŇčraan to~u pińßaj…¨~…ģa mińßapiw to~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u ka…ĺo~ukitakit so~uwa…ĺ no~u ina sapipa °o~urip to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ a ¶aaj ka…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ. ¶i rafiko~u~u…ĺ paini jana ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ kai * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģan, o~u sapińßirat…ôŇč to~u nano~u o~unto~u a so~uwa…ĺ i paŇčka…ĺatis .
S.FORM: O romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina ŚúčťöõśĮćŤ™ěśó• To mihecahecaan saka 2 folad 21 romi'ad niketonan o romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina, o Linhoko kiwiko, kakak ato punka a lekatep i 1999 miheca mapasadak maketong, nai 2000 miheca, mihecahecaan saka 2 folad 21 romi'ad niketonan o romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina. Patosokan sakiliyok no hekal misinting midama to katadamaan no sowal, micekeroh palosiyang to sowal no ina a onto, saka ecaaw kalasawad ko sowal i hekal. Likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Calay: Pangkalatis sowal a onto 1948 miheca, o Pakistan a sifo pala no kitakit a sowal ko Orto a sowal, sakapico'a'ang no sakawali a Pakistan a finawlan. I Pangkalatis sowal a onto i, ira ko 5 tamdaw i 1952 miheca 2 falad 21 romi'ad makowangay mapatay no sofitay . 1956 miheca, no Pangkalatis a kinpo matelek o Pangkalatis sowal ato Orto sowal malosowal no kitakit. 1971 miheca, Pangkalatis kitakit micidek to Pakistan a misiked, i Taka misafa'eloh patireng to "Pa'ading to sowal no ina a pihiratengan 'otoc" . 1999 miheca 11 folad, Linhoko kiwiko, kakak, punka a lekatep saka 30 lekad a kalomaoc miketon kai mihecahecaan saka 2 folad 21 romi'adan o "o romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina" . O romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina nai 2000 mihecaan kalomihecaan mitiway, o sapicekeroh to sakalacecay rihaday hekal ato kasahirahira no sowal, a mapadama ko polong a sowal no ina . I 1998 miheca 1 folad 9 romi'ad patilid to tilid ci Kofi Annanan, milongoc cingraan to pihayda mihapiw to romi'ad no kalokitakit sowal no ina sapipa'orip to sowal no hekal a caay kalasawad. Ci Rafikul paini yana romi'ad kai 2 folad 21 romi'adan, o sapihirateng to nano onto a sowal i Pangkalatis .
